steps.title: Set up the inequality test
steps.content: Need every $(x,y)$ in the table to satisfy $2x-y>883$.

steps.title: Test each table
steps.content: Choice D: $2(442)-0=884$, $2(441)-(-2)=884$, $2(440)-(-4)=884$. All exceed $883$. Other choices give values $\le 883$ in at least one row.

steps.title: Identify the table
steps.content: Only choice D works. That matches choice D — D is correct.
